creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you Yuri,

Reporters can help us save time and have issues seen quicker by setting maintainer-approval to + on attachments/patches they submit where the port has no maintainer.

Also for all future issues please provide details on QA, ie something like

* portlint: OK (looks fine.)
* testport: OK (poudriere: versions, archs, options)
